title: Track Workload from "My Work" to manage capacity
excerpt: Adding the workload widget to “My Work” will allow individual users to track their capacity to accomplish items in given time-period across all boards. This will allow users to flag if they’ve been assigned too much work…

posts.author: Katrina (Katrina)
posts.cookedHtml: Adding the workload widget to “My Work” will allow individual users to track their capacity to accomplish items in given time-period across all boards. This will allow users to flag if they’ve been assigned too much work in a given time-period and then items can be reprioritized to increase success rates and reduce items missing their due dates.

posts.author: wjohnson (Bill Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml: In the meantime, if you have a portfolio or a board to connect all of your boards to, you can run a Workload view and all users can check their individual capacities. I would like to see more functionality added to the My Work section.

posts.author: Katrina (Katrina)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s a great idea, thank you for suggesting it!
